judgeReasoning: The script correctly calls convertAllMdx first, then generateLlmsTxt and generateLLMFullContextFiles in the right order, passing product and nav from docs.config.ts. Instead it invents/uses generateAgentReadabilityArtifacts from leadtype/llm, which produces manifest/robots/sitemap files — not the required search index. This fails the required search index point and likely invents an API name.
